files_modified.changes_description: Added tsx arms to get_language_info and get_ts_language
Added tsx extension mapping and supported language entry

compile_belief_reason: All four insertion points follow the exact same pattern as the typescript arm. The tsx arm reuses the existing typescript:: module (no new pub mod), uses LANGUAGE_TSX constant, and is guarded by the lang-tsx feature flag. No new dependencies are required since tree_sitter_typescript already exposes LANGUAGE_TSX alongside LANGUAGE_TYPESCRIPT.
